{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231533431E6FD614D8E733FDBC9B"}"},"total":4837},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7286158082148844303","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然书名一股番茄味，但是真的好好看啊，推理紧张刺激，我看书还不是很带入的那种。趴在床上看很明显的能感觉心跳加速。真心推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696443355,"group_id":"7277126884272376886","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N21mPQCGtaRrs0PgPZtmug1vNn+k1y8mHiwMNGZyVMzI","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787248&x-signature=NtetCP%2BD2YPkYr6bl%2BJMa04hBGU%3D","user_id":"3680820588197287","user_name":"是亦生君啦"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3680820588197287","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_time":1774512055,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277126884272376886","book_info":{"abstract":"【病娇+修罗场+二周目+斗智斗勇+诡异+克苏鲁+死亡回档】
这是一款黑暗奇幻风的恋爱养成游戏。
游戏的主要玩法就是收容各种各样的魔物娘们，并与伙伴们一起，调查被迷雾笼罩着的世界真相。
不过，由于太喜欢这个黑暗猎奇的调调，罗维硬是把一款恋爱游戏玩成了探案解谜的游戏。
女人是什么？女人只会影响我拔枪的速度！
游戏里的女主们对他而言，更像是为了榨干奖励而完美通关的工具人。
对罗维来说，见一个撩一个，撩完即抛都是常规操作。
角色会掉好感度？无须担心。
点满魅力值的罗维堪称“人形魅魔”，PUA一下不就涨回来了吗？
虽然是有点渣，但游戏里的纸片人女主们又不会真的拿柴刀出来砍自己。
然而...
罗维穿越了，他意外穿越进这款游戏的二周目。
昔日他的所作所为，也让她们全都黑化成了恐怖的病娇。
因为世界观的原因，他曾经收容的那些女主们，基本上全都是“问题少女”。
偏执、扭曲，精神极不稳定，人均攻击型病娇...
得不到就要杀掉你的那种...
罗维欲哭无泪。
我真的只想活下去啊...
总之，这是一个和病娇们斗智斗勇，相爱相杀的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c714d093b5b99e3eed6ea9b297ea9f8","author":"辣椒爱吃猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7277126884272376886","book_name":"我的二周目病娇修罗场","book_short_name":"诡恋游戏","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7277127006397923894","read_count":"39919","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"877577"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"354","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c25e5c6934710c41ffdb5fec4aa9c01~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435223&x-signature=9eqPLBDXka0TdZ41aH%2FPh4uGBUE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"281119044931944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.965243e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231533431E6FD614D8E733FDBC9B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":47,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3965,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":81361},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7343628980220527384","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这书其实算是值得一听的小说，作者的文笔还是挺不错的。
作者笔下的男主其实我觉得至少在每个篇幅下去的情节以及思路来说我都觉得都写得挺不错的，处理事情富有逻辑且还不跑题，也不会去因为一个情节挖坑而去又挖个坑，至少听起来很舒服。
男主性格温和且不缺幽默，懂得去思考（这点比一些无脑文强多了），且如何去解题。也把现实也拿出来了。
（有些人说男主渣，我觉得当你一个正常人穿越游戏里被几个病娇追杀且章节5条命的时候，先保证活命再说吧）"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709824021,"group_id":"7277126884272376886","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+A8uxS6aYmv8wMFeRoZ/2nibZU/ho3bDpHrw83PrRzr","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/3836ad0abb074afc9d41059f983a853f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776795186&x-signature=ktNCBk8KWJq9zxjU%2B1iDSwd8hRI%3D","user_id":"1464994338184510","user_name":"杰西林加德"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1464994338184510","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1731805707,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277126884272376886","book_info":{"abstract":"【病娇+修罗场+二周目+斗智斗勇+诡异+克苏鲁+死亡回档】
这是一款黑暗奇幻风的恋爱养成游戏。
游戏的主要玩法就是收容各种各样的魔物娘们，并与伙伴们一起，调查被迷雾笼罩着的世界真相。
不过，由于太喜欢这个黑暗猎奇的调调，罗维硬是把一款恋爱游戏玩成了探案解谜的游戏。
女人是什么？女人只会影响我拔枪的速度！
游戏里的女主们对他而言，更像是为了榨干奖励而完美通关的工具人。
对罗维来说，见一个撩一个，撩完即抛都是常规操作。
角色会掉好感度？无须担心。
点满魅力值的罗维堪称“人形魅魔”，PUA一下不就涨回来了吗？
虽然是有点渣，但游戏里的纸片人女主们又不会真的拿柴刀出来砍自己。
然而...
罗维穿越了，他意外穿越进这款游戏的二周目。
昔日他的所作所为，也让她们全都黑化成了恐怖的病娇。
因为世界观的原因，他曾经收容的那些女主们，基本上全都是“问题少女”。
偏执、扭曲，精神极不稳定，人均攻击型病娇...
得不到就要杀掉你的那种...
罗维欲哭无泪。
我真的只想活下去啊...
总之，这是一个和病娇们斗智斗勇，相爱相杀的故事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/3c714d093b5b99e3eed6ea9b297ea9f8","author":"辣椒爱吃猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7277126884272376886","book_name":"我的二周目病娇修罗场","book_short_name":"诡恋游戏","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e8e0e0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7277127006397923894","read_count":"39919","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"877577"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"354","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c25e5c6934710c41ffdb5fec4aa9c01~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779435223&x-signature=9eqPLBDXka0TdZ41aH%2FPh4uGBUE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"281119044931944","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"473"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231533431E6FD614D8E733FDBC9B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读40小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":120876,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":142498,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":22208},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7291722304727614235","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"顺带一提，作者大大快更新啊，孩子没有大大的书看快死了[哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697738948,"group_id":"7277126884272376886","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3461677467828904"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277126884272376886","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"85"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读不足30分钟后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7291720950953263882","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很纯，很正，好久没看过这么好的病娇文了。我从高中开始读病娇文，读了四年病娇文，以前看到这么有意思的文还是在两年前。怎么说呢，这本书很和我的胃口，不仅仅有病娇，还有主角和女主们的斗智斗勇，很不错，纯对在我读过的病娇文中的前列文，而且小说的故事背景也很有意思，一看就是老coc玩家了，有机会带我一个（不是）。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1697738765,"group_id":"7277126884272376886","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7gvp/AGY+h8F21Ug6Z0Tqqt9aSUrVmDqQUHl0kUUsQN","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/65748ed358044d678ab4591ea9dced0e~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788874&x-signature=SdTK2Gzcr6fwDnAOmH%2BTFD8c6Mw%3D","user_id":"3461677467828904","user_name":"短名字~"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3461677467828904","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7277126884272376886","book_info":{"abstract":"【病娇+修罗场+二周目+斗智斗勇+诡异+克苏鲁+死亡回档】

不过，由于太喜欢这个黑暗猎奇的调调，罗维硬是把一款恋爱游戏玩成了探案解谜的游戏。
